title: Update RPL test vectors, interop tests, and add RFC2119 validation tests for Trickle/MRHOF
description: Extend test/vectors/rpl_*.json, rust/lichen-rpl/tests/, lichen/tests/rpl_routing/ and validation scripts to cover new MUST checks for Trickle parameters and MRHOF. Ensure Rust <-> C/Zephyr produce identical behavior.
